column7: Supports sustained nitrogen uptake; split application at 3 stages improves grain yield by ~15%.
Supports early stand establishment; balanced NPK reduces nutrient deficiency risks at transplanting.
Provides N + S for improved grain quality; sulfur reduces protein dilution at high yields.
Enhances grain plumpness and weight; K at PI stage significantly improves head rice recovery.
Zinc and micronutrient support improves N use efficiency; foliar application at tillering boosts leaf area and crop vigor.
Microbial inoculants (bacteria, fungi) enhance nutrient cycling; nano-P improves phosphorus use efficiency.
Organic acids improve P solubilization; reduces P fixation in clay-heavy paddy soils common in lowlands.
Green manure improves soil fertility index; Azolla-released nutrients support high-yield inbred's demand sustainably.
Water-soluble NPK at PI improves panicle exsertion; foliar application bypasses soil P fixation common in lowland paddies.
